sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23228 — Ancients
Constantine I the Great (AD 307-337). AE3 or BI nummus (17mm, 1.97 gm, 5h). NGC AU 5/5 - 3/5. Antioch, 2nd officina, ca. AD 324-325. Laureate head of Constantine I right / CONSTAN/TINVS / AVG
sales.description:
Ancients
Constantine I the Great (AD 307-337). AE3 or BI nummus (17mm, 1.97 gm, 5h). NGC AU 5/5 - 3/5. Antioch, 2nd officina, ca. AD 324-325. Laureate head of Constantine I right / CONSTAN/TINVS / AVG / SMANTB, legend in four lines; wreath above, pellet below. RIC VII 57.  www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice

https://coins.ha.com/itm/ancients/roman-imperial/constantine-i-the-great-ad-307-337-ae3-or-bi-nummus-17mm-197-gm-5h-ngc-au-5-5-3-5/p/61605-21001.s?type=DA-DMC-CoinArchives-WorldCoins-...

sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23229 — Ancients
Constantine I the Great (AD 307-337). AE3 or BI nummus (20mm, 3.59 gm, 7h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Trier, 2nd officina, AD 322. CONSTAN-TINVS AVG, helmeted, cuirassed bust of Constantine I
sales.description:
Ancients
Constantine I the Great (AD 307-337). AE3 or BI nummus (20mm, 3.59 gm, 7h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Trier, 2nd officina, AD 322.
